concerns.text: Task IDs T026, T040, T042, T046, T048, T062, T074, T076, T077, T081, T082, T096 refer to completely different work between plan.md and tasks.md, creating unresolvable traceability conflicts that make tasks unexecutable due to conflicting context.

T069 does not explicitly mandate stratification across five major domains (tech, e-commerce, finance, healthcare, SaaS) required by FR-031b, making the task less executable as the implementer may miss this requirement.
Plan.md Phase 0 research tasks (P0-T01 through P0-T04) have no corresponding tasks in tasks.md, leaving research feasibility work unaccounted for and unexecutable.
Task ID T096b ('Compute checksums for data files') exists in plan.md Phase 2 but has no corresponding task in tasks.md, leaving work unaccounted for.
T016 records checksums in 'data/checksums.txt' while T076 records checksums in 'output/checksums.txt', creating potential confusion about canonical checksum location that needs clarification.
Both T049 and T083 verify FR-028 Quickstart execution time (30 URLs in ≤30 minutes), creating redundant verification effort that should be consolidated.
